name: Eggplant Caviar
dropPhrase: A rich and flavorful eggplant-based dish.
method:
1. Place eggplant and garlic in a sauté pan, cook out all water.
2. Deglaze with Yondu, then turn off heat.
3. Fold in remaining ingredients.
ingredients: Roasted Peeled Eggplant|500|gr;Roasted Garlic|30|gr;Parsley|15|gr;Dill|15|gr;Olive Oil|15|gr;Lemon Juice|20|gr;Kosher Salt|10|gr;Yondu|20|gr
